entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Important global crop commodity and source of cooking oil, confectionery, and livestock feed

entities.name: STEM ROT DISEASE
entities.description: Devastating disease of groundnut caused by Sclerotium rolfsii, potentially causing 100% yield loss

entities.name: SCLEROTIUM ROLFSII
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes stem rot disease in groundnut

entities.name: GENOMIC-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: Approach for accelerated and precise development of stem rot resistance varieties

entities.name: LINKAGE ANALYSIS
entities.description: Method used to analyze genetic linkage for resistance to stem rot disease

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: Method used to identify quantitative trait loci for stem rot resistance

entities.name: STEM ROT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The genetic ability of groundnut to resist stem rot disease

entities.name: BI-PARENTAL RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE POPULATION
entities.description: A population of 270 individuals developed from TG37A and NRCG-CS85

entities.name: TG37A
entities.description: A susceptible parent line used in the development of the recombinant inbred line population

entities.name: NRCG-CS85
entities.description: A resistant parent line used in the development of the recombinant inbred line population

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: Approach used to generate single nucleotide polymorphism genotyping data

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: Genetic markers used to develop a genetic map

entities.name: GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A map consisting of 585 SNP loci spanning a distance of 2430 cM

entities.name: MULTI-SEASON PHENOTYPING
entities.description: Method used in conjunction with genotyping data for QTL analysis

entities.name: EPISTATIC QTL
entities.description: Quantitative trait loci showing epistatic interactions, with 44 identified explaining 14.32 to 67.95% phenotypic variation

entities.name: B04
entities.description: Chromosomal region where a 5.2 Mb QTL was identified

entities.name: LEUCINE RICH REPEATS
entities.description: Genes identified within the QTL on B04

entities.name: ZINC FINGER MOTIFS
entities.description: Genes identified within the QTL on B04

entities.name: ETHYLENE RESPONSIVE FACTORS
entities.description: Genes identified within the QTL on B04
